source_files: public/locales/<lang>/loc_start.json for lang in de, en, fr
_meta.description: 'Start' guided entry page with quick links to chambers, cantons, municipalities.
_meta.format: Each entry: context (where the string appears in the UI, its role, placeholders and length/grammar constraints) + the current de/en/fr texts as translation reference. Use the context when translating into a new language; a null text means the key is missing in that language file.
_meta.generated: 2026-07-13, code-verified against app/ sources; regenerate when public/locales texts or consuming components change.

start.title.context: /start page (app/routes/pages/start/start.tsx): the h1 page title of the guided quick-links entry page. Short, inviting.

start.lede.context: /start page: lede paragraph under the h1 explaining what the page offers — links to federal chambers, the cantonal parliaments, and a search into communes. Avoid 'every'/'any' since commune data coverage is partial. One sentence of prose.
start.lede.en: Direct routes into the pages people look for most: the federal chambers, the cantonal parliaments, and a way into many communes.
start.lede.de: Direkte Wege zu den meistgesuchten Seiten: die eidgenössischen Kammern, die Kantonsparlamente und der Zugang zu vielen Gemeinden.
start.lede.fr: Des accès directs vers les pages les plus recherchées : les chambres fédérales, les parlements cantonaux et l’entrée vers de nombreuses communes.

start.search_label.context: /start page: visually hidden (sr-only) <label> for the page-filter search input; screen readers only. Clarifies the search filters this page (client-side), not the whole site.

start.search_placeholder.context: /start page: placeholder in the page-filter input, hinting what can be typed (a chamber, canton or commune name). Ends with an ellipsis.
start.search_placeholder.en: Search a chamber, a canton or a commune…
start.search_placeholder.de: Eine Kammer, einen Kanton oder eine Gemeinde suchen…
start.search_placeholder.fr: Rechercher une chambre, un canton ou une commune…

start.no_matches.context: /start page: empty-state message when the page filter matches no federal body, canton or commune. {{q}} is replaced with the user's query; the surrounding quotation marks are part of the string and should follow the target language's conventions.

start.federal_heading.context: /start page: h2 heading of the first section, the federal parliaments (Swiss Bundesversammlung, Liechtenstein Landtag). Short noun/adjective.

start.federal_sub.context: /start page: small muted annotation right-aligned next to the 'Federal' heading. Lowercase, very short.

start.chambers_label.context: /start page, federal card: small label above the chamber links (Nationalrat / Ständerat) that deep-link into chamber-filtered votings. 'Chambers' = the two chambers of the Swiss federal parliament. Short plural noun.

start.cantonal_heading.context: /start page: h2 heading of the section listing all 26 Swiss cantonal parliaments. Short.

start.cantonal_sub.context: /start page: small muted annotation next to the cantonal heading, stating the list is complete (all 26 cantons). Very short.

start.communal_heading.context: /start page: h2 heading of the communal (municipal) parliaments section. 'Communal' = Swiss communes/municipalities. Short.

start.communal_sub.context: /start page: small muted annotation next to the communal heading hinting this section is search-driven (communes only appear after typing a query). Single short word, lowercase noun.

start.communal_intro.context: /start page, communal section: prose note shown before any search, explaining only communes with an elected parliament are listed (~460 of ~2,100) and prompting use of the search box above. The numbers are approximate facts, keep them.
start.communal_intro.en: Only communes with an elected parliament appear here (about 460 of some 2,100). Search above to jump in.
start.communal_intro.de: Hier erscheinen nur Gemeinden mit einem gewählten Parlament (rund 460 von etwa 2100). Oben suchen, um einzusteigen.
start.communal_intro.fr: Seules les communes dotées d’un parlement élu figurent ici (environ 460 sur quelque 2100). Cherchez ci-dessus pour y accéder.

start.results_count.context: /start page, communal section: match-count line while searching. {{n}} is the number of matching communes. Keep short.

start.results_capped.context: /start page, communal section: shown instead of the plain count when results are capped at 60 rendered items. {{n}} = number shown, {{total}} = total matches; ends with a prompt to narrow the query. Keep short.

start.link_overview.context: /start page, federal card: chip link to the parliament's overview page. Short noun, must fit a small chip.

start.link_members.context: /start page, federal card: chip link to the parliament's members (MPs) list. Short plural noun.

start.link_votings.context: /start page, federal card: chip link to the parliament's votings (roll-call votes) page. Short plural noun.

start.link_lobby.context: /start page, federal card: chip link to the parliament's lobby page (MPs' declared interest/lobbying ties). Short.

start.link_alignment.context: /start page, federal card: chip link to the voting-alignment analytics page (who votes like whom; agreement between members/parties). Short noun; de uses 'Übereinstimmung' (agreement).

start.link_loyalty.context: /start page, federal card: chip link to the party-loyalty analytics page — how often members vote with their parliamentary group (de 'Fraktionstreue'). Short noun.

start.link_affairs.context: /start page, federal card: chip link to the parliament's affairs page. 'Affairs' = legislative business items (de 'Geschäfte'). Short plural noun.

metas.start.title.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_start' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. start page SEO <title>.

metas.start.desc.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_start' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. start page meta-description.
metas.start.desc.en: Quick links into the parliaments of Switzerland and Liechtenstein: the federal chambers and their pages, every cantonal parliament, and a search for communal parliaments.
metas.start.desc.de: Direkte Links in die Parlamente der Schweiz und Liechtensteins: die eidgenössischen Kammern und ihre Seiten, alle Kantonsparlamente und eine Suche für Gemeindeparlamente.
metas.start.desc.fr: Liens directs vers les parlements de Suisse et du Liechtenstein : les chambres fédérales et leurs pages, tous les parlements cantonaux et une recherche pour les parlements communaux.
metas.start.desc.it: Collegamenti diretti ai parlamenti di Svizzera e Liechtenstein: le camere federali e le loro pagine, tutti i parlamenti cantonali e una ricerca per i parlamenti comunali.
metas.start.desc.es: Enlaces rápidos a los parlamentos de Suiza y Liechtenstein: las cámaras federales y sus páginas, todos los parlamentos cantonales y un buscador de parlamentos comunales.
